title: stemonoporus rigidus
intro: Stemonoporus rigidus is a species of tree in the family Stemonuraceae, native to Sri Lanka, and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are often used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stemonoporus rigidus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the bark, leaves, or roots in hot water to create teas or decoctions, which are then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
